rows.label: qev012201_MSG0001
rows.name: Huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0002
rows.name: Huh, huh, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0003
rows.name:
I thought it couldn't be...
but it is you, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Did you come all the way to the White
Tree Continent for work? Good job![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm in the middle of an
adventure as usual![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0006
rows.name:
But the Doll I was riding got
attacked on the other side of the
lake ahead and stopped moving.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0007
rows.name:
So now I'm being looked
after by this caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev012201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about who attacked her.

rows.label: qev012201_JNK0020
rows.name: Suspect

rows.label: qev012201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask why she was riding a Doll.

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0008
rows.name: Who attacked me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmmm, I don't really know,
actually. I was just moving
along when I was suddenly sniped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0010
rows.name:
They got its leg, so I abandoned
it there for the time being and
walked all the way here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Why was I riding something as
expensive as a Doll, you ask?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0012
rows.name: Ummm... Can you keep it a secret?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0013
rows.name:
There was a unit undergoing maintenance in the
HQ hangar, and, well... I decided on my own
initiative to help out with an operational test...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0014
rows.name: Ummm... yeah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Basically... I took it
without permission...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Even though it got attacked, I'm
completely fine myself, so I could
go back anytime if I wanted to.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0017
rows.name:
But I can't just leave a
broken Doll behind either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0018
rows.name:
The Nopon of this caravan said they'd help,
but fortunately the damage is light.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Since it's originally my profession, I
think I can handle the repairs alone. The
problem is... the materials, of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0020
rows.name:
The caravan has some stock for their
merchandise, but it's not nearly enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0021
rows.name:
So, um... Your junior has
another favor to ask...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Could you help me gather the
materials needed for the repairs?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0023
rows.name:
The fact that we met here
feels like fate, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_JNK0030
rows.name: Cooperate

rows.label: qev012201_SEL0031
rows.name: Help gather the materials.

rows.label: qev012201_JNK0040
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev012201_SEL0041
rows.name:
Tell her you have no
intention of helping.

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0024
rows.name: Really!? Senpai, you really are so kind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0025
rows.name:
It's my dream to become a
BLADE like you, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0026
rows.name: It's true! I'm not just flattering you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0027
rows.name:
Strong, kind, and robust!
That's my motto, after all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0028
rows.name:
Ugh... Since you've listened
to me this far, in for a penny,
in for a pound, right...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Don't say such sad things,
please help meee.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0030
rows.name:
I heard that BLADEs on duty are business
rivals, but also part of a community.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0031
rows.name:
...Well, I'm not on a mission,
let alone a BLADE...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0032
rows.name:
But still, it's a Senpai's duty
to help a junior in trouble![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0033
rows.name: So... Please! I'm begging you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0034
rows.name: Good work, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0035
rows.name:
How is it going? With
the material gathering?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0036
rows.name:
Well, asking you to just go pick up
materials necessary for Doll repairs around
here might be asking a bit much, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0037
rows.name:
Let's call it a life hack...!
I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0038
rows.name: Welcome back, Senpai.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0039
rows.name: How was it? The results?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0040
rows.name:
Thank you so much! Now I can
get to work on the repairs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0041
rows.name:
So let's head to the broken
Doll right away, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0042
rows.name:
Honestly, I'm a bit nervous
about walking there alone~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0043
rows.name: Could you accompany me to the site?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0044
rows.name:
The repairs shouldn't take that
long, so just think of it as
accompanying me on a little walk![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0045
rows.name:
Come on, come on, we're wasting
time just standing here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012201_MSG0046
rows.name: Anyway, let's depart![ST:wait ]
